sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n82250" key="peristerotrofei=on" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">περιστεροτροφ-εῖον</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">τό</gen>, <sense id="n82250.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">place where doves are reared</tr_>, Varro <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <title_ TEIform="title">RR</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">3.7</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
